pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Spring Boot 3.x ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks Jakarta EE 9+ namespace support required by modern libraries.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compiling with Java 8 settings on a Java 21 JDK or vice-versa causes incompatibility; Spring Boot 3 requires Java 17+.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace maven-compiler-plugin source/target configuration with release flag for modern Java compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs and Maven plugin versions; using old flags may cause warnings or errors in strict environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit commons-lang3 dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit commons-pool2 dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit caffeine dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit gson dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM.
Remove explicit httpclient dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM or replaced.
Remove explicit javax.servlet-api dependency as Spring Boot 3 uses Jakarta EE (jakarta.servlet-api).
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.servlet-api is not available in Spring Boot 3.x which uses Jakarta EE 9+ namespaces; keeping it causes classpath conflicts or missing class errors if code expects Jakarta.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove explicit mockito-core dependency as it is now managed by Spring Boot BOM.

Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 16+ serialization rules.
spring-base-core/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: Java 16+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields in serializable classes must be annotated with @Serial (or be private static final long) to avoid compile-time errors when using --enable-preview or strict serialization checks in newer toolchains.

spring-base-csrf/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java version property to 21 to align the build configuration with the target JDK.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Replace javax.annotation imports with jakarta.annotation to align with Spring Boot 3 namespace changes.
spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3/Jakarta EE 9+ applications, causing compilation errors.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Replace @Configuration with @AutoConfiguration to use the new Spring Boot 3.2+ auto-configuration annotation.
spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: While @Configuration still works, @AutoConfiguration is the required/standard annotation for auto-configuration classes in modern Spring Boot 3.3+ to ensure proper registration and metadata generation.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for cleaner string interpolation syntax.
Migrate the Resource annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.
spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile error for the missing import.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Resource import to jakarta.annotation.Resource for Jakarta EE namespace compatibility.

spring-base-sign/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java version property to 21 to align the build configuration with the target JDK.

spring-base-sign/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate the import statement for the Resource annotation from the javax package to the jakarta package to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
spring-base-sign/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3, which relies on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; this change prevents a compile-time 'package javax.annotation does not exist' error.

spring-base-sign/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation imports to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
spring-base-sign/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Java 11+ / Spring Boot 3; code fails to compile with 'package javax.annotation does not exist'.

spring-base-sign/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.2+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.

spring-base-util/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate servlet API dependency from the legacy javax namespace to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration.
spring-base-util/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+ use the 'jakarta.*' namespace; using 'javax.servlet' causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime because the classes are no longer present under the javax prefix.

spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate javax.annotation.Nonnull import to Jakarta namespace or remove if unused, as part of the javax to jakarta package migration required by Spring Boot 3.
spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3); using it causes a ClassNotFoundException or compilation error if the specific javax.annotation-api dependency is not explicitly added, but typically this annotation is replaced by jakarta.annotation.Nonnull or removed if not strictly needed.

spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import to jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace changes.
spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.servlet package has been renamed to jakarta.servlet in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3); using the old javax.servlet import results in a ClassNotFoundException at runtime or compilation error if the old servlet API is not present.

spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime, or compilation errors if the old API is not on the classpath.

spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are no longer available in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing compilation errors or ClassNotFoundException at runtime.

spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.general_idea: Migrate the Nullable annotation import from the Java EE javax package to the Jakarta EE jakarta package to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
spring-base-util/src/main/java/org/gy/fr.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x and Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compilation error (cannot find symbol) for the import and any usage of the annotation.

spring-base-xss/pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Java version property to 21 to configure the build for the target JDK.

spring-base-xss/src/main/java/org/gy/fra.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 2.x @Configuration with Spring Boot 3.x @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
spring-base-xss/src/main/java/org/gy/fra.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x deprecates using @Configuration on auto-configuration classes in favor of @AutoConfiguration to align with the new auto-configuration metadata and component scanning rules.

spring-base-xss/src/main/java/org/gy/fra.general_idea: Migrate validation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
spring-base-xss/src/main/java/org/gy/fra.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found).
